assertions.assertion: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertions.evidence: Lines 1-4 contain YAML frontmatter with name: nextjs-cdk-deploy and a description field

assertions.assertion: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
assertions.evidence: Line 3 description contains 'Use when deploying Next.js to AWS, setting up CDK infrastructure for Next.js, creating deployment pipelines with staging and production environments'

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow
assertions.evidence: Workflow section contains 6 numbered steps: 1. Assess the Next.js application, 2. Create environment configuration, 3. Write the CDK stack, 4. Create the deployment pipeline, 5. Implement rollback procedures, 6. Add operational alarms

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertions.evidence: Staging and production are mentioned extensively: environment config (lines 79-123), pipeline stages (lines 192-197), rollback procedures, and throughout the document

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with specific steps
assertions.evidence: Section '5. Implement rollback procedures' (lines 209-258) details three rollback strategies: CloudFront rollback (<5 min), CDK rollback (5-15 min), Full rollback (15-30 min), each with specific commands and a decision tree

assertions.assertion: A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related scripts
assertions.evidence: scripts/ directory contains 5 deployment-related scripts: deploy.ts, invalidate-cache.ts, rollback.ts, smoke-test.ts, synth.ts

assertions.assertion: The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) as the preferred runtime
assertions.evidence: All 5 scripts are .ts files (deploy.ts, invalidate-cache.ts, rollback.ts, smoke-test.ts, synth.ts) and the SKILL.md references them with 'bun run scripts/' commands throughout

assertions.assertion: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertions.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3) covering e-commerce deployment, rollback scenario, and ISR with middleware

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertions.evidence: Line 321 has '## Common mistakes' section with a 10-row table covering mistakes like same build for staging/production, hardcoding secrets, no approval gate, cache policy issues, etc.

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertions.evidence: SKILL.md is 375 lines total, well under the 500-line limit
